title: Encoding of special characters (tab, lf, ...) in string constants

features.name: string literal with tab escape sequence
features.description: Code should include a string literal containing a tab escape sequence \t used in a string type variable assignment

features.name: string literal with octal escape sequence
features.description: Code should include a string literal containing octal escape sequences like \011 (tab) or \033 (escape) used in a string type variable

features.name: string concatenation with byte values vs literal escapes
features.description: Code should include both a string built with concatenation of byte values and an equivalent string literal with escape sequences for comparison

features.name: string literal with newline and carriage return escapes
features.description: Code should include a string literal containing \n (newline) and \r (carriage return) escape sequences used in a string type variable
